changeSet.author: openelis
changeSet.comment: Normalize pharmaceutical stage 3 notebook pages so aliquoting pages are stored as CHILD_SAMPLE_CREATION. Older environments can misclassify these pages as routing pages, which blocks stage 3 -> 4 progression.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE notebook_page np SET page_type = 'CHILD_SAMPLE_CREATION' FROM notebook n WHERE n.id = np.notebook_id AND np.page_order = 3 AND np.title = 'Sample Processing & Aliquoting' AND ( n.id = 3 OR n.parent_notebook_id = 3 OR lower(n.title) LIKE 'pharmaceuticals laboratory%' ) AND COALESCE(np.page_type, '') <> 'CHILD_SAMPLE_CREATION';
